rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FREDERIC S. BAKER
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Court Determination Of The Persons Entitled To Distributions From The Decedent?S Probate Estate Where Testamentary Dispositions Do Not Name Actual Devisees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 08/05/2022 per counsel's request (via e-mail on 07/11/2022). Notes were e-mailed to counsel on 07/11/2022. This matter will be heard by Judge Puri in Dept 210 on 08/05/2022 at 9:00 a.m.
